title: coptosapelta montana
intro: Coptosapelta montana, also known as the mountain sapindus, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Coptosapelta montana include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The plant is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its essential oil is extracted for use in aromatherapy and as a natural insect repellent.
